notes.note: **World Cup widget:** Follow live scores, match schedules and results in one place.
**On-device translations:** Translate full web pages in more languages while keeping your content private on your device.
Fixed display issues when rotating your device.

system_requirements:
## Operating systems
 - iOS 15
 - iOS 16
 - iOS 17
 - iOS 18
 - iOS 26
text:
Enjoying Firefox? Leave a review. Got ideas or feedback? Join the conversation on [Mozilla Connect][1]. Need help? Our volunteer support community has you covered on [Mozilla Support][2]

[1]: https://connect.mozilla.org/
[2]: https://mzl.la/iOSSupport
title: Firefox for iOS 152.0 Release
